title: Infant feeding and nutrition - Canada.ca
content:
## Infant feeding and nutrition
Learn about breastfeeding your infant and their nutritional needs at different stages of growth.

## Services and information

### Breastfeeding and infant nutrition
Know how breastfeeding your baby can help with infant nutrition. Also discover helpful resources on breastfeeding.
Discover the nutritional needs of your infant for all stages of growth. Also access menus for older infants and young children.
Learn about infant feeding. Also find an update for health professionals on infant feeding recommendations.
- Public Health Agency of Canada
